ritualist.name: Ritualist
ritualist.description: Ritualists create miracles through hymns and dances, and can change state on the fly with masks. (Buffs, Versatility)

summoner.name: Summoner
summoner.description: Summoners use totems and summons to overwhelm enemies. (Summons, Damage)

bloodmagik.name: Acolyte
bloodmagik.description: Acolytes use their own health to support others and deal damage. (Support, Damage)
bloodmagik.shortDescription: Sacrifice blood for power and heals

totem.name: Totem
description: Click Combo: RIGHT-LEFT-RIGHT
Summon a Totem that damages
enemies around it every 0.4s.
 Mana Cost: 30
 Total Damage: 12% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 6%)
( Air: 6%)
 Duration: 30s
 Area of Effect: 8 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)

relikProficiency.name: Relik Proficiency I
description: Double your Main Attack's beam speed and
increase your damage when using a relik.
 Main Attack Damage: +5%
(Damage is split between beams)

totemCost1.name: Cheaper Totem
description: Reduce the mana cost of Totem.
 Mana Cost: -10

totemicsmash.name: Totemic Smash
description: Your Totem will deal damage where it lands.
 Total Damage: 150% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 120%)
( Fire: 30%)
 Area of Effect: 3.5 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)

relikSpread.name: Distant Grasp
description: Reduce your Main Attack's spread,
and increase its beam speed by +33%.
- Hand of the Shaman

haul.name: Haul
description: Click Combo: RIGHT-RIGHT-RIGHT
Leap towards your Totem.
 Mana Cost: 15

relikBeams.name: Hand of the Shaman
description: Your Main Attack will emit +2 extra beams.
(Increases your overall damage by +65%)

uproot.name: Uproot
description: Click Combo: RIGHT-RIGHT-LEFT
Emits a rapid projectile that will
explode and knock enemies away.
(Hold shift to pull instead)
 Mana Cost: 30
 Total Damage: 130% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 80%)
( Earth: 30%)
( Thunder: 20%)
 Range: 18 Blocks
 Area of Effect: 5 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)

haulCost1.name: Cheaper Haul
description: Reduce the mana cost of Haul.
 Mana Cost: -5

aura.name: Aura
description: Click Combo: RIGHT-LEFT-LEFT
Radiates an aura from your Totem
 Mana Cost: 40
 Total Damage: 180% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 150%)
( Water: 30%)
 Range: 16 Blocks

totemShove.name: Totem Shove
description: Casting Totem while looking
at an existing Totem will instead
shove it forwards, dealing damage
to any enemy it crashes into.
(Sneak to reverse its direction)
 Total Damage: 120% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 90%)
( Air: 30%)
 Range: ~12 Blocks
 Area of Effect: 3.5 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)

shamanEarthPath.name: Earth Mastery
description:  Earth Damage: +2-4
 Earth Damage: +20%

shamanAirPath.name: Air Mastery
description:  Air Damage: +3-4
 Air Damage: +15%

shamanThunderPath.name: Thunder Mastery
description:  Thunder Damage: +1-8
 Thunder Damage: +10%

shamanFirePath.name: Fire Mastery
description:  Fire Damage: +3-5
 Fire Damage: +15%

shamanWaterPath.name: Water Mastery
description:  Water Damage: +2-4
 Water Damage: +15%

naturejolt.name: Nature's Jolt
description: Hitting the ground after using Haul
will deal damage around you.
 Total Damage: 150% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 110%)
( Earth: 40%)
 Area of Effect: 4.5 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)

overseer.name: Overseer
description: Increases Uproot and
Haunting Memory's range.
Hitting Totem with either
 Range: +6 Blocks

danceOfTheRain.name: Rain Dance
description: While mid-air, your Totem will
leave a streak of rain that damages
enemies under it every 0.4s.
 Total Damage: 60% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 30%)
( Water: 30%)
 Duration: 6s
 Area of Effect: 3.5 Blocks (Line-Shaped)

shockingAura.name: Shocking Aura
description: Aura will travel much faster and
 Total Damage: +20% (of your DPS)
( Thunder: +20%)

flamingTongue.name: Flaming Tongue
description: Uproot becomes lashing flames,
which hit 3 times but will not
Haunting Memory will no longer
attach Masks to enemies.
 Total Damage: -50% (of your DPS, for Uproot, per hit)
( Damage: -15%)
( Earth: -30%)
( Thunder: -15%)
( Fire: +10%)

puppetMaster.name: Puppet Master
description: Your Totem will summon 1 Puppet
every 3s. (Max 3) They throw knives
at nearby enemies every 0.5s.
 Total Damage: 20% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 16%)
( Air: 2%)
( Earth: 2%)
 Duration: 30s
 Range: 16 Blocks
Min Summoner Archetype: 3

masks.name: Mystic Masks
description: When casting Uproot, instead
wear one of the Mystic Masks.
(Shift + Uproot to remove it)
 Lunatic: +15% Damage Bonus to Self
-15% Resistance Bonus to Self
 Fanatic: +25% Resistance to Self
-25% Walk Speed to Self
 Heretic: +50% Walk Speed to Self
-10% Damage Bonus to Self
Min Ritualist Archetype: 2

hymnOfHate.name: Hymn of Hate
description: When wearing the Mask of the Lunatic , killing
an enemy with Aura will cast a new Aura
at its location, dealing -50% of its damage.
Required Ability: Mystic Masks

bloodPool.name: Sacrificial Shrine
description: Your Totem will siphon 2% of your health
every 0.4s and transfer it into a Blood Pool .
Aura will spend 15 points of Blood Pool 
to deal +35% damage and heal all allies.
 Total Heal: 25% (of your max health)
Min Acolyte Archetype: 3

stagnation.name: Stagnation
description: Enemies hit by Nature's Jolt
 Effect: 40% Slowness () to Enemies
 Duration: 3s
Required Ability: Nature's Jolt

auraCost1.name: Cheaper Aura
description: Reduce the mana cost of Aura.
 Mana Cost: -5

uprootCost1.name: Cheaper Uproot
description: Reduce the mana cost of Uproot.
 Mana Cost: -5

rebound.name: Rebound
description: Once Aura reaches its maximum
range, it will bounce back and
deal its effects a second time.
Sacrificial Shrine will
heal 35% less health.

morePuppets.name: More Puppets
description: Increase your maximum Puppets by +1.
Required Ability: Puppet Master

hauntingMemory.name: Haunting Memory
description: When you switch Masks, throw your previous one
forwards. If it hits an enemy, it will attach for a
short time and debuff them. You will not receive
the effects of your Mask until it returns.
 Total Damage: 240% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 240%)
 Range: 14 Blocks
 Lunatic: -15% Damage Bonus () to Enemies
 Fanatic: -15% Resistance Bonus () to Enemies
 Heretic: +30% Slowness () to Enemies
 Duration: 4s
Min Ritualist Archetype: 3

totemRange.name: Totemic Reach
description: Increase your Totem's area of effect.
 Area of Effect: +4 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)

bloodConnection.name: Blood Connection
description: If you are outside of your Totem's
range, Haul will teleport you to it.

explodingPuppet.name: Exploding Puppets
description: When your Puppets have 3s left,
they will charge towards enemies
at high speed and explode.
 Total Damage: 200% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 150%)
( Fire: 50%)
 Area of Effect: 3 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
Required Ability: Puppet Master

hymnOfFreedom.name: Frog Dance
description: When wearing the Mask of the Heretic ,
Haul will instead bounce you off
the ground 3 times at an increasing
speed and damage nearby enemies.
Frog Dance does not require Totem to be used.
 Total Damage: 200% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 150%)
( Water: 50%)
 Area of Effect: 4.5 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
Required Ability: Mystic Masks
Min Ritualist Archetype: 4

moreBloodPool.name: Larger Blood Pool
description: Increase your maximum Blood Pool  by +30 points.
Required Ability: Sacrificial Shrine

description: Hitting enemies with Uproot or
Haunting Memory will inflict them
with Whipped ⇶. Your Summons will
focus Whipped ⇶ enemies and deal
 Effect: +20% Damage Bonus to Summons
 Duration: 10s

totemicShatter.name: Totemic Shatter
description: While wearing the Mask of the Fanatic ,
your Totem will shatter upon impacting
the ground, rapidly triggering 8s
Regeneration will only heal
50% of its usual amount.

maskRotation.name: Masquerade
description: Switching between Masks 2 times
will give you 30 Mana.
Min Ritualist Archetype: 4

lashingLance.name: Lashing Lance
description: Flaming Tongue gains +1 hit, and
now inflicts enemies with Bleeding 
for +1.5s per hit. (Max 6s)
Haunting Memory will instead
inflict +6s of Bleeding .
Bleeding  enemies take damage every 0.5s.
Bleeding  damage dealt within Totem's range
also adds +0.8 points to your Blood Pool .
 Total Damage: +0% (of your DPS, for Uproot, per hit)
( Damage: -5%)
( Thunder: +5%)
 Total Damage: 60% (of your DPS, from Bleeding)
( Damage: 60%)

Min Acolyte Archetype: 4

morePuppets2.name: More Puppets II
description: Increase your maximum Puppets by +2.

immersion.name: Artist's Immersion
description: Your Masks reduce the cost of different
abilities based on the active mask.
 Lunatic: -30%  Aura Cost
 Fanatic: -65%  Totem Cost
 Heretic: -50%  Haul Cost
Required Ability: Mystic Masks

vengefulspirit.name: Vengeful Spirit
description: Your Totem will give all players
in its range a damage bonus.
 Effect: +20% Damage Bonus (⚔) to Allies

doubleTotem.name: Double Totem
description: Increase your maximum Totems by +1.
Totem and Aura will do 40% less damage.
Regeneration and Sacrificial Shrine
will heal 40% less health.

description: Enemies hit by Aura will be

( Air: +30%)

haulCost2.name: Cheaper Haul II

regeneration.name: Regeneration
description: Every 0.4s, your Totem will heal
every player within its range.
 Total Heal: 1% (of your max health)

tether.name: Twisted Tether
description: Nearby Bleeding  enemies will take
damage for every 2% Health you lose.
 Total Damage: 65% (of your DPS, per 2% health)
( Damage: 45%)
( Air: 20%)
 Range: 20 Blocks
Required Ability: Lashing Lance
Min Acolyte Archetype: 7

jungleSlayer.name: Crimson Effigy
description: Totem will summon an Effigy that will
attack enemies and push them towards
the nearest Totem every 0.5s.
The Effigy will live for as long as its
Totem does.
Each Totem will summon its own Effigy.
Each additional Effigy summoned will
decrease all Effigy damage by 0.8x.
 Total Damage: 100% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 75%)
( Fire: 25%)
 Vision: 18 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
Min Summoner Archetype: 6

chants.name: Tribal Chants
description: When switching masks, cause an
 Lunatic: +15% Damage Bonus (⚔) to Allies
 Duration: 6s
 Fanatic: 45% Resistance Bonus to Allies
 Duration: 3s
 Heretic: +60% Walk Speed to Allies

 Area of Effect: 8 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
 Cooldown: 8s (per Chant)
Required Ability: Mystic Masks
Min Ritualist Archetype: 8

eldritchCall.name: Eldritch Call
description: Casting Totem while holding shift will spend
30 points of Blood Pool  (per Totem) to
call upon 4 nightmarish tentacles.
Tentacles debuff bleeding enemies in range and
each deal damage to one enemy every 2s.
Blood Connection turns into a teleport
while Eldritch Call is active.
 Total Damage: 700% (of your DPS, per strike)
( Damage: 540%)
( Thunder: 80%)
( Fire: 80%)
 Area of Effect: 18 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
 Effects: +40% Slowness () to Enemies
-15% Resistance Bonus () to Enemies

maddeningRoots.name: Maddening Roots

seekingTotem.name: Seeking Totem
description: While wearing the Mask of the Heretic ,
your Totem will move towards you,
unless you are within its range.

auraCost2.name: Cheaper Aura II
description: Reduce the mana cost of Aura.
 Mana Cost: -5

auraDamage1.name: Imbued Totem

( Damage: +4%)

sharpHealing.name: Fluid Healing

moreBloodPool2.name: Bloody

commander.name: Commander
description: Casting Aura while holding shift will
rally all active Puppets to your
Your Main Attack deals 5% more
damage for each rallied Puppet.
While not rallied, your Summons' attacks
will build up the duration of this ability
by +0.1s per attack. (Max 30s)
 Effect: +25% Attack Speed to Puppets
Required Ability: Puppet Master

helpingHand2.name: Friendly Fire

strongerTether.name: Bloodletting

Casting it again will call them back early.
While they are attacking, your Hummingbirds
will not apply their passive effects to you.

( Damage: 20%)
( Air: 5%)
( Thunder: 5%)
 Duration: 10s
 Vision: 16 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
 Effect: +40% Walk Speed to Self

tankBloodPool.name: Blood Rite
description: When any player takes damage within

tripleTotem.name: Triple Totem
description: Increase your maximum Totems by +1.
Totem and Aura will do 50% less damage.
Regeneration and Sacrificial Shrine
will heal 50% less health.

sanguineStrike.name: Sanguine Strike
description: Greatly reduce Main Attack spread.
Your Main Attack will now inflict enemies
with Bleeding  for +0.25s per beam.
Bleeding  enemies take damage every 0.5s.
Bleeding  damage dealt within Totem's range
also adds +0.8 points to your Blood Pool .
 Total Damage: 60% (of your DPS, from Bleeding)
( Damage: 60%)

moreBloodPool3.name: Bloodier
description: Increase your maximum Blood Pool  by +30 points.

 Effects: +20% Walk Speed to Self

uprootCost2.name: Cheaper Uproot II
description: Reduce the mana cost of Uproot.
 Mana Cost: -5

maskOfTheAwakened.name: Awakened
description: After saving 150 mana from your Masks'
mana reductions, switching Masks will
cause you to become Awakened ♚
for 25s, giving you the upsides of all
Masks at once with no downsides.
Switching to an attached Mask
while Awakened ♚ will immediately
recall the Mask back to you.
Required Ability: Artist's Immersion
Min Ritualist Archetype: 11

bloodLament.name: Blood Sorrow
description: Casting Uproot or Haunting Memory while
holding shift will spend 70 points
of Blood Pool  to cast a destructive beam
that chains between enemies and allies,
and damages enemies every 0.2s.
You and any allies within the beam will
receive +2% Overhealth ❤ per hit.
Bonus health decays over 20s.
 Total Damage: 120% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 100%)
( Water: 20%)
 Duration: 5s
 Range: 24 Blocks
Min Acolyte Archetype: 12

shepherd.name: Shepherd
description: When you or your Summons kill an enemy,
gain +1 Max Puppets ⚘ for 15s. (Max +8)
Required Ability: Puppet Master

puppetry.name: Puppetry
description: Increase your maximum Puppets by +2.

rupture.name: Rupture

Min Acolyte Archetype: 6

crystalKnives.name: Crystal Knives

 Total Damage: +10% (of your DPS)
( Damage: +3%)
( Earth: +2%)
Required Ability: Puppet Master
Min Summoner Archetype: 8

betterCallHaul.name: Freestyle
description: Haul, Blood Connection, and Frog Dance

repulse.name: Repulse
description: Once Aura rebounds, it will radiate back out
and deal its effects a third time.
Sacrificial Shrine will heal 50% less health.

effuse.name: Effuse
description: Flaming Tongue grants 1% Blood Pool  per hit.
Required Ability: Flaming Tongue
Min Acolyte Archetype: 11

slingshot.name: Slingshot

memania.name: Egomania
description: When wearing the Mask of the Fanatic ,
Aura will radiate from yourself
instead of your Totem.

 Total Damage: +10% (of your DPS)
( Damage: +10%)
Required Ability: Mystic Masks

totemichammer.name: Totemic Hammer
description: When wearing the Mask of the Lunatic ,

Increase Totemic Smash's damage.
 Total Damage: +50% (of your DPS)
( Damage: +40%)
( Fire: +10%)
Required Ability: Mystic Masks

moreBloodPool4.name: Bloodiest
description: Increase your maximum Blood Pool  by +30 points.
Increase your maximum Bleeding  duration by +1.5s.

getDown.name: Fortified Formation

While protected, you take reduced
damage and your Effigies strike
back at attackers every 2s.
 Total Damage: 300% (of your DPS)

( Fire: 80%)

manapool.name: Pool of Rejuvination

Gain +1 Mana every 0.2s while
inside of at least one pool.
 Duration: 8s
 Area of Effect: 5 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)

haemomagnetic.name: Haemomagnetic
description: Blood Sorrow will chain 50% further
 Total Damage: +40% (of your DPS)
( Damage: +30%)
( Water: +10%)

corporealManifestation.name: Corporeal Manifestation
description: When wearing the Mask of the Awakened ♚,

 Range: 3 Blocks
Required Ability: Haunting Memory

summonerUlt.name: Patchwork Abomination
description: Click Combo: F
Summons the Patchwork Abomination,
a highly unstable summon.
Hit the Abomination with Overseer to
switch between close-ranged and
long-range attack mode.
The Abomination will attack enemies
every 1.25s in close-ranged mode,
and every 1.75s in long-ranged mode.
Exploding Puppets will cause the
Abomination to explode when it dies.
 Total Damage: 2400% (of your DPS, Attack)
( Damage: 1600%)
( Earth: 500%)
( Thunder: 300%)
 Total Damage: 5000% (of your DPS, Explosion)
( Damage: 4000%)
( Fire: 1000%)
 Duration: 20s
 Vision: 32 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
 Area of Effect: 12 Blocks (Circle-Shaped, Explosion)
Activate abilities to charge
your Ultimate Meter  to 100%.

acolyteUlt.name: Monument to Gloom
description: Click Combo: F
Your Totem becomes possessed by an eldritch
demon, granting +5% Blood Pool  to nearby
acolytes every 0.4s

Your Totem massively grows in size,

When your Totem lands, it summons
a massive Thundercloud that zaps enemies
every 1s, stunning them for 1.5s.
Damage is split between all enemies.

your Ultimate Meter  to 100%
